attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ATO_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CANCELLED_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CONTEXT,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATED_BY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CREATE_DATETIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,
'CG' GLOBAL_NAME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.HEADER_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_TYPE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.OPEN_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.OPTION_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.OPTION_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORDERED_QUANTITY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY_UOM,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.PRICING_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.PROMISE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REQUEST_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.RETURN_CONTEXT,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SERVICE_END_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SERVICE_REFERENCE_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SERVICE_START_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.INVOICE_INTERFACE_STATUS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SCHEDULE_STATUS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SERVICE_DURATION,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.PRICING_QUANTITY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.FULFILLED_QUANTITY,
TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,'[^!-~a-zA-Z0-9]+','',1,0,'i') , X'0d' , '') , X'0a' , '')  CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER,
--CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF, /* COMMENTED AS A PART OF EDWTD-CR-15311-8(dkarmoor-SalesOrd) CR */  
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_LINE_ID,/* ADDED AS A PART OF EDWTD-CR-15311-8(dkarmoor-SalesOrd) CR */  
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REFERENCE_HEADER_ID,/* ADDED AS A PART OF ERP SPRINT 3 */  
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REFERENCE_LINE_ID, /* ADDED AS A PART OF ERP SPRINT 3 */ 
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.FOB_POINT_CODE, /* ADDED AS A PART OF ERP SPRINT 3 */ 
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, /*Added as a part of July7th2019 Plan*/
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM 
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE <> 'CONFIG'
AND
NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'Y'   
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
/* AND CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID  IN (SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.CG1_ORD_ID) */
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.LINE_ID ORDER BY CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
